name: Corn & Bean Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked kidney or brown beans
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is suitable for a gluten-free diet.
Heat oil over medium heat in a small nonstick skillet. Cook onion, stirring occasionally about 4 minutes, until translucent.
In a 6-cup casserole sprayed with nonstick coating, beat eggs, milk, salt, and hot pepper sauce until smooth. Stir in beans, corn, and cooked onion. Mix well.
Place the casserole in a larger pan. Pour enough hot water into the larger pan to come 2 inches up the sides. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Stir the mixture and bake for another 20 minutes, or until a tester inserted near the center comes out clean.
